name: @tank/flight-search
description: Search for flights, compare prices, and find cheapest dates using SerpAPI Google Flights (all airlines, 250 free/month), Amadeus Self-Service (airport lookup, free), and Travelpayouts (price calendars, free). Includes Python scripts for flight search, IATA code resolution, and price calendars. No pip install needed. Triggers: find flights, cheap flights, flight prices, fly to, flights from, when is cheapest to fly, price calendar, IATA code, airport code, flight API, airfare, SerpAPI, Amadeus.
